title: Exclusivo Mezcla Fleece Throw Blanket for Couch, Super Soft Striped Jacquard Bed Blanket, Lightweight Fuzzy Cozy for All Seasons, 127x152 CM, Navy Blue
features: Soft and Cozy: Crafted from premium microfiber polyester and delicately brushed for supreme softness

Versatility: Suitable for any season, this luxurious throw flannel fleece blanket serves multiple purposes. It can effortlessly transition from a cozy bedspread to a stylish coverlet or a functional bed cover/bed Sheet, making it an indispensable accessory in your home
Durability: Constructed with sturdy microfiber fabric and reinforced with solid stitches

Elegant Design: Elevate your decor with this blanket’s velvet and soft feel and sophisticated striped jacquard pattern. The double-faced plush fabric not only offers a luxurious texture but also adds a glossy sheen that complements and enhances your living space with its modern aesthetic
Easy Care: This blanket is machine washable and dryer safe. No fading, no shedding, no shrinkage in the wash. Easy to care and pack
